title: ExoShopkeepers
description: Custom NPC shops with visual trade editor and FancyNpcs integration
body:
# ExoShopkeepers 🏪
A powerful shopkeeper plugin that seamlessly integrates with FancyNpcs to create immersive trading experiences. Transform any NPC into a fully customizable shop with an intuitive interface and unlimited trading options.

## Features ✨
- **FancyNpcs Integration** 🤝 - Works directly with your existing FancyNpcs setup
- **Multi-Page Trading** 📄 - Create shops with unlimited trades across multiple pages
- **Visual Trade Editor** 🎨 - Intuitive GUI for setting up trades without touching config files
- **Any Mob Type** 🐾 - Use any living entity as your shopkeeper
- **Quick Edit Mode** ⚡ - Sneak + click NPCs to jump straight into editing (admin only)
- **Custom Branding** 🎭 - Personalize GUI titles, NPC names, and messages
- **Full Persistence** 💾 - All shops and trades save automatically
- **Folia Compatible** 🚀 - Native support for Folia server software
- **Deep Customization** ⚙️ - Configure plugin behavior via config.yml and shopkeepers.yml
- **Full NPC Control** 🎮 - Use any FancyNpcs `/npc` command to edit your shopkeepers

## Commands 📝
- `/shopkeepers open <name>` - Open a shopkeeper GUI
- `/shopkeepers create <name> <mob>` - Create a new shopkeeper
- `/shopkeepers edit <name>` - Edit an existing shopkeeper
- `/shopkeepers remove <name>` - Remove a shopkeeper
- `/shopkeepers reload` - Reload configuration

## Permissions 🔐
- `exoshopkeepers.use` - Access to open shops (default: true)
- `exoshopkeepers.admin` - Access to create, edit, and manage shops (default: op)

## Setup 🛠️
1. Install FancyNpcs
2. Drop ExoShopkeepers into your plugins folder
3. Restart your server
4. Create your first shop with `/shopkeepers create <name> <mob>`
5. Customize settings in config.yml and shopkeepers.yml to your liking
6. Use any FancyNpcs `/npc` command to further customize your shopkeeper NPCs

The trade editor is straightforward: top row for items players receive, middle and bottom rows for payment items. Changes save in real-time as you switch pages or close the GUI.

Support Server: https://discord.gg/XSp8z5xVPy
